reviews.review_msg: Probably the easiest professor I've had. His marking schemes are, for the most part, straight forward. Everything you need to know is in the lecture slides, and he puts them up punctually. A great teacher to have if you're already motivated and just want a quick credit. He will not make you terribly interested in Linguistics if you aren't already.

His assignments are fairly easy, but you can never be sure what grade you will get on his exams. Midterm/Final: There was no mode for our class; all the grades were spread out. The Prof is helpful, but CONFUSING at times.. ask ask clarify argue argue. The notes he posts on webct are his lectures therefore many ppl end up not coming to class.
exm hard..always no time to finish..and think about questions...

i had him 3 years ago for 221 and i would have said he was the worst teacher ever, fast forward 3 years and i'd say he's one of the best. he's very clear, his marking isn't that bad either as long as you've been paying attention in class. but this isn't exactly the easiest class so, you'd better stay on top of things!

I liked his lectures a lot, but his exams were really REALLY REALLY bad.  He did not give enough practice with questions before and he always crammed too much into the tests.  I understood everything and did well, but I have a feeling most of my classmates were lost with his exams. It was his first time teaching the course tho.
good lectures and notes.. but hard exams
he's good, but he's not easy at all! if u care about ur GPA he's not the option... o_o
Awesome class. Kochetov is a great teacher. He gets the material across, is super organized and is fun. One one the best ling profs I've had so far
Lovely and kinda cute. He makes a lot of improvement in his course. The best professor in SFU!!
